name: Chicago Camera Repair Specialist
description_short: Chicago Camera Repair Specialist is a credit repair provider based in Chicago, Illinois. Rated 4.2/5 with 112 Google reviews, reflecting strong customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Chicago Camera Repair Specialist is a credit repair provider serving clients in Chicago, Illinois. With 112 Google reviews and a 4.2/5.0 rating, Chicago Camera Repair Specialist has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a camera store, Chicago Camera Repair Specialist provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Chicago, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Chicago Camera Repair Specialist operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Chicago, Illinois area who are considering Chicago Camera Repair Specialist should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
